name: divan
description: Divan: vibe coder'in vezirler kurulu. Sadrazam, planlama, TDD, debugging, UI/UX, React ve zanaat paketleri.

metadata.description: Divan: vibe coder'in vezirler kurulu. Sadrazam (uctan-uca orkestrator) + planlama, TDD, debugging, UI/UX ve React paketleri.

plugins.name: sadrazam
plugins.description: Bas vezir: her istegi Divan Protokolu ile bastan sona bitmis, dogrulanmis teslimata cevirir

plugins.name: core-pack
plugins.description: Cekirdek gelistirme disiplini: beyin firtinasi, plan yazma/yurutme, sistematik debugging, TDD, tamamlama-oncesi dogrulama

plugins.name: ui-pack
plugins.description: UI/UX paketi: ozgun frontend tasarim, tarayici testi (Playwright) ve design-system uretici

plugins.name: react-pack
plugins.description: React paketi: best practices, composition patterns ve web tasarim kurallari
